name: Stephanie's Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
1/2 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
3 (8 oz) packages cream cheese, cut into cubes and softened
recipeInstructions:
For the Crust: In a bowl, combine cracker crumbs, pecans and sugars; stir in the melted butter. Press the mixture into the bottom and 1/2 inch up the sides of a buttered 9-inch springform pan. Chill crust for 1 hour.
For the Filling: In a bowl, whisk together pumpkin, eggs, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, salt, and brown sugar. In a large bowl, cream together cream cheese and granulated sugar. Beat in cream, cornstarch, vanilla, and bourbon mixture. Pour filling into crust and bake at 350°F for 50-55 minutes, or until center is just set. Let cool on a rack for 5 minutes.
For the Topping: In a bowl, whisk together sour cream, sugar, and bourbon. Spread over top of cheesecake and bake for 5 more minutes. Let cool in pan on rack and chill covered overnight. Remove sides of pan and garnish top with pecans.
